Title: ECB CRON ingests daily FX rates at 16:30 CET
Objective: Validate scheduled ECB ingestion stores daily FX rates successfully.
Preconditions: ECB feed reachable; CRON job configured for 16:30 CET; DB access to fx_rates.
Steps: Set system clock/test scheduler to 16:30 CET window.
Trigger or wait for ECB ingestion job execution.
Query fx_rates for current date and expected currencies.
Expected Result: One row per currency for the day is stored/updated in fx_rates with valid timestamp and rate values.
Test Data: ECB sample XML for current date

Title: ECB feed outage falls back to last known rates
Objective: Ensure system handles ECB downtime with retries and cached fallback.
Preconditions: Prior-day fx_rates exist; network control available to block ECB endpoint.
Steps: Block access to ECB XML endpoint.
Trigger ingestion job.
Observe retry attempts and fallback behavior in logs/dashboard banner.
Expected Result: Job retries, then uses last known rates without crash; dashboard indicates rates-as-of warning date.

Title: Schema validation failure on changed ECB XML structure
Objective: Verify malformed/changed XML is rejected safely.
Preconditions: Ability to inject modified XML payload.
Steps: Provide XML payload with structural/schema deviations.
Run ingestion job.
Review logs and stored rates for affected date.
Expected Result: Validation fails, error is logged/alerted, and previous valid day's rates remain active.

Title: Duplicate rate rows for same date/currency are UPSERTed
Objective: Confirm duplicate FX entries do not create duplicate records.
Preconditions: Existing fx_rates row for target date/currency.
Steps: Run ingestion with payload containing same date/currency pair already in DB.
Query fx_rates for duplicate count.
Validate latest value update semantics if applicable.
Expected Result: Only one unique row exists per date/currency; data remains clean.

Title: Network timeout triggers configured retry policy
Objective: Validate timeout handling with retry attempts before fallback.
Preconditions: Ability to simulate 10s+ network delay/timeout.
Steps: Throttle/blackhole ECB request to force timeout.
Trigger ingestion job.
Verify retry count and end state.
Expected Result: System executes up to configured retries and exits gracefully with fallback/alert behavior.

Title: Missing currency in ECB payload is skipped with warning
Objective: Ensure absent currency rates are handled without full job failure.
Preconditions: Injectable payload missing one supported currency.
Steps: Provide ECB XML missing one configured currency code.
Run ingestion.
Open dashboard for currency status and inspect logs.
Expected Result: Missing currency is skipped; warning logged; remaining currencies ingest successfully.

Title: Outlier FX rate change >20% is flagged
Objective: Verify sanity-check flags suspicious FX spikes for review.
Preconditions: Outlier threshold configured; admin alert channel enabled.
Steps: Inject rate value with >20% day-over-day change.
Trigger ingestion.
Check alerting/log/dashboard verification flag.
Expected Result: Rate record is flagged for verification and visible warning is generated without service crash.

Title: Disk-full during FX write fails gracefully and alerts
Objective: Validate write failure path when storage is unavailable.
Preconditions: Controlled environment to simulate no disk space on write target.
Steps: Exhaust disk for ingestion write path or simulate ENOSPC.
Run ingestion.
Validate alert and absence of partial corrupt write.
Expected Result: Job fails gracefully, sends alert, and does not persist partial/invalid daily data.

Title: Partial XML download is rejected and retried
Objective: Ensure incomplete ECB downloads are not processed.
Preconditions: Transport layer control to truncate response payload.
Steps: Serve truncated ECB XML response.
Run ingestion.
Verify checksum/size validation and retry path.
Expected Result: Partial file is discarded; ingestion retries; no malformed data enters fx_rates.

Title: ECB rate limiting is respected with backoff
Objective: Validate backoff behavior when provider throttles requests.
Preconditions: Ability to emulate HTTP 429/ratelimit headers.
Steps: Return 429 with retry-after headers from ECB endpoint proxy.
Trigger ingestion.
Inspect timing/logs for header-respecting backoff.
Expected Result: Ingestion backs off per rate-limit guidance and completes or fails gracefully with alert.

Title: Leap-year date (Feb 29) FX ingestion and lookup
Objective: Ensure leap-day rates are stored and retrievable correctly.
Preconditions: Test data includes Feb 29 rate entries.
Steps: Run ingestion for leap-day sample date.
Query fx_rates for Feb 29 entries.
Execute conversion using leap-day date context.
Expected Result: Feb 29 rates persist and are used correctly by conversion logic.

Title: Multi-region aggregation converts and sums correctly
Objective: Validate mixed-currency regional revenue aggregation into selected output currency.
Preconditions: Sales data exists for at least UK(GBP) and DE(EUR); valid FX rates loaded.
Steps: Open Sales Insights dashboard.
Select regions DE and UK, granularity Weekly, currency EUR.
Compare displayed total revenue vs audited calculation.
Expected Result: Aggregated revenue equals expected conversion/sum logic within tolerance.

Title: EUR selection returns raw base values
Objective: Verify business rule path where selected currency equals EUR.
Preconditions: EUR-base source values available for selected period.
Steps: Select any region set with available data.
Set display currency to EUR.
Compare displayed values to raw base amounts.
Expected Result: System returns unconverted base values for EUR selection.

Title: Unsupported currency defaults to EUR with alert
Objective: Validate handling of currencies absent in fx_rates.
Preconditions: Currency selector exposes unsupported currency or API accepts it.
Steps: Request unsupported currency conversion.
Submit filters and refresh KPIs.
Observe currency fallback behavior and user notification.
Expected Result: Dashboard falls back to EUR and shows user-facing currency unavailable message.

Title: No sales data shows explicit empty-state cards
Objective: Ensure empty datasets render user-friendly no-data outputs.
Preconditions: Region/time period with no sales records.
Steps: Select region/date range known to have no sales data.
Apply filters.
Inspect KPI cards and charts.
Expected Result: Dashboard displays 0/No Data states with clear labeling and no crash.

Title: Future dates are blocked in date picker
Objective: Validate invalid future date range prevention.
Preconditions: Date picker available in UI.
Steps: Open date selector.
Attempt selecting a future date range.
Apply selection if UI allows attempt.
Expected Result: Future dates cannot be selected; invalid range is prevented before query execution.

Title: Long-running query times out with guidance message
Objective: Ensure graceful timeout behavior for heavy queries.
Preconditions: Ability to simulate slow DB query path.
Steps: Trigger aggregation with intentionally heavy filter set.
Force backend response beyond timeout threshold.
Observe UI response and retry behavior.
Expected Result: User sees timeout message asking to narrow filters; UI remains responsive.

Title: Stale region feed indicator appears after 24h lag
Objective: Validate stale-data indicator when regional feed is delayed.
Preconditions: Region with data freshness older than 24 hours.
Steps: Load dashboard with delayed region feed metadata.
Select affected region.
Inspect region label/status indicators.
Expected Result: Stale indicator appears for delayed region with clear warning semantics.

Title: Region multi-select enforces maximum item limit
Objective: Confirm UI prevents overly large filter selections.
Preconditions: Multi-select configured with max item policy.
Steps: Attempt selecting more than the allowed item count.
Continue adding selections rapidly.
Observe validation message and applied selection size.
Expected Result: Selection is capped at configured maximum and user receives clear max-items message.

Title: Missing LY baseline shows N/A with tooltip
Objective: Validate display behavior when prior-year comparison data is unavailable.
Preconditions: Dataset where current period exists but LY period absent.
Steps: Select period/region with missing LY data.
Enable LY comparison metrics.
Inspect LY fields and tooltip/help text.
Expected Result: LY metrics show N/A with explanatory tooltip; no misleading numeric value shown.

Title: Zero FX rate value falls back to latest valid rate
Objective: Ensure divide/multiply-by-zero risk is mitigated in conversion flow.
Preconditions: Injected fx_rates row with zero rate for selected date/currency.
Steps: Configure rate_to_eur as 0 for target currency/date.
Run aggregation for affected period.
Inspect output values and alert logs.
Expected Result: System uses latest valid rate, avoids invalid math, and raises admin alert.

Title: Unauthorized regions are excluded from user filter options
Objective: Validate access control enforcement in regional data visibility.
Preconditions: Test user with restricted region entitlement.
Steps: Login as restricted user.
Open region filter and API payload inspector.
Attempt accessing unauthorized region data directly.
Expected Result: Unauthorized regions are hidden and inaccessible via UI/API for that user.

Title: Rapid filter changes debounce requests and prevent race conditions
Objective: Ensure UI cancels stale requests during quick filter interactions.
Preconditions: Network tab available for request observation.
Steps: Rapidly toggle region/currency/granularity controls.
Observe concurrent request behavior.
Validate final UI reflects only latest selection state.
Expected Result: Previous requests are debounced/aborted and final state is consistent with last user action.

Title: LY comparison uses corresponding prior-year week
Objective: Validate LY metric offset logic (364-day aligned week comparison).
Preconditions: Known weekly dataset with verified LY comparison benchmark.
Steps: Select a target week with known LY numbers.
Enable LY metric display.
Compare UI LY values to benchmark/calculated prior-year week.
Expected Result: LY values match expected corresponding prior-year week calculation.

Title: Region toggle updates cards and chart within performance SLA
Objective: Verify dynamic UI updates happen under 200ms target.
Preconditions: Performance instrumentation available.
Steps: Open main dashboard with multiple regions enabled.
Toggle one region off and on.
Measure update latency for cards and chart redraw.
Expected Result: Cards/chart update correctly and interaction latency meets <200ms target under normal load.

Title: CSV export contains currently filtered SKU rows
Objective: Validate detailed-table export for active filters and sorting context.
Preconditions: SKU-level grid populated; export feature enabled.
Steps: Apply specific region/date/SKU filters.
Click CSV export.
Open downloaded file and compare row subset with UI filter state.
Expected Result: CSV is generated and includes only filtered SKU dataset with expected columns.

Title: Chart render failure shows fallback widget
Objective: Ensure chart component failure path is handled with user recovery action.
Preconditions: Ability to force chart library/data render error.
Steps: Inject chart render exception.
Load main dashboard.
Inspect fallback message and reload control.
Expected Result: User sees 'Unable to load chart' style fallback with reload option; page stays functional.

Title: Dashboard remains usable on low-resolution displays
Objective: Validate responsive vertical stacking and usability at small viewport sizes.
Preconditions: Device emulator/browser responsive mode.
Steps: Set viewport to low resolution (e.g., 1366x768 and mobile width).
Open dashboard and scroll through filters/chart/table.
Check control accessibility and overlap issues.
Expected Result: Layout adapts without clipping/overlap; key actions remain usable.

Title: Large data grid (10k+ rows) remains smooth via virtualization
Objective: Verify table scalability and interaction performance under high row counts.
Preconditions: Dataset with 10k+ rows available in detailed table.
Steps: Load table with 10k+ SKU rows.
Scroll rapidly and sort by key metrics.
Observe frame drops and input lag.
Expected Result: Scrolling/sorting remain smooth and memory usage is controlled using virtualized rendering.

Title: Oversized export triggers fallback strategy
Objective: Validate graceful handling when CSV export exceeds immediate download threshold.
Preconditions: Export size threshold configured; notification channel active.
Steps: Generate export request with very large filtered dataset.
Trigger CSV export.
Observe fallback behavior and user notification.
Expected Result: System uses paginated/server-side fallback and informs user (e.g., file delivery notification).

Title: Image/asset load failures show placeholders
Objective: Ensure UI degrades gracefully when static assets are unavailable.
Preconditions: Ability to block image/static asset requests.
Steps: Block dashboard image/icon asset URLs.
Load dashboard screens.
Inspect rendered UI for broken-image behavior.
Expected Result: Placeholders/default styles appear; no broken image icons or layout breaks.

Title: Malformed API JSON triggers full-screen error boundary
Objective: Validate robust error handling for invalid backend payloads.
Preconditions: Mock/proxy to return malformed JSON.
Steps: Return malformed JSON from dashboard API.
Load/refresh dashboard.
Observe error boundary behavior and recovery options.
Expected Result: UI shows controlled 'Something went wrong' overlay without uncaught crashes.

Title: Session expiry preserves filter state and redirects to login
Objective: Confirm user session timeout flow with state retention.
Preconditions: Short session timeout config; saved filter state support.
Steps: Apply non-default filters on dashboard.
Expire session token and trigger API call.
Login again and verify restored filter context.
Expected Result: User is redirected to login with friendly message; prior filters are restored post-login.

Title: Trend lines remain distinguishable for 5+ regions
Objective: Verify multi-region chart color choices are accessible and distinguishable.
Preconditions: Chart configured with 5+ region series.
Steps: Select five or more regions on chart.
Inspect line colors/legend in normal and color-blind simulation modes.
Verify readability against chart background.
Expected Result: All region lines remain visually distinguishable and accessible in chart/legend.

Title: Tiny chart points are still easy to hover
Objective: Validate hit-area sizing for precise chart tooltip interactions.
Preconditions: Dense chart with small points present.
Steps: Load trend chart with dense daily datapoints.
Attempt hovering near small points at multiple zoom levels.
Check tooltip reliability and pointer tolerance.
Expected Result: Tooltips trigger reliably without pixel-perfect aiming; interaction remains user-friendly.

Title: Slow network shows skeleton loaders before data arrives
Objective: Ensure loading-state UX is visible and stable under poor network conditions.
Preconditions: Browser network throttling enabled.
Steps: Throttle network to slow profile.
Open dashboard and switch filters.
Observe interim loading UI behavior.
Expected Result: Skeleton loaders/pulsing placeholders appear until data resolves; no blank or frozen sections.
